A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Why Chakra.org and Dandavats.com refuse to publish a link...

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-08-16 · 8 answers
to this site? I have written to them and no response given so far (2 weeks).
What is wrong? Tell me please as I will be the first to part.
user [2] · 2007-08-16
ask them... oh I forgot they wont talk
user [75] · 2007-08-16
my experience with chakra is that they do talk if you ask them. from dandavatas youll get the admins reply that hes not the one deciding what gets published. who is, i dont know.
user [19] · 2007-08-16
I dont know who decides but what is this?
http://www.dandavats.com/?p=4105
user [2] · 2007-08-16
wow, such an inspiring link, thank you abhiram.
user [38] · 2007-08-17
They may be slow in communication but Krishna.com links to "us" from yesterday:

http://www.krishna.com/links/pages/Community/index.html
user [72] · 2007-08-17
nice :)
user [2] · 2007-08-21
somebody sent a small note to Chakra and they published here:
http://www.chakra.org/announcements/links.html
user [140] · 2007-08-21
because it is their site(s), they have their own agenda , not to say that is a bad thing.
